generated_oml:
// Physical Twin Entity and its Sensing Components
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin running on the vehicle's Jetson Orin Nano; collects sensor data via ROS2 topics"
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLidar : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR mounted on the vehicle; provides 3D point cloud data via ROS2"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance IntelD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel D435i Depth Camera; streams depth images to the Digital Twin over ROS2"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle speed and steering angle sensors integrated with NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance ControlTriggerEventSource : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Source of control trigger events (e.g., enable/disable ACC, desired speed changes) transmitted to the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControlTriggerEventDataTransmitted
]

// Transmitted Data
instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLidar
]

instance DepthImageDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelD435iDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ControlTriggerEventDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ControlTriggerEventSource
]

// Data assets for processing
instance VehicleStateDataForACC : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data extracted for ACC computation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateDataForMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data extracted for real‑time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataForACC : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Point cloud data prepared for ACC and clustering processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance DepthImageDataForACC : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image data prepared for ACC and clustering processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackDataForACC : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered and tracked object data used by the ACC model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance ObjectTrackDataForMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Clustered and tracked object data presented to the monitoring UI"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

// Enablers
instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for the Data Monitoring and Visualization Service"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for ACC computation and point‑cloud processing on the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for remote management actions such as enabling ACC and triggering emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance ReportingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for generating time‑series reports of vehicle state and tracking data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportingService
]

// Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring service that displays vehicle state, 3‑D track visualization, and projected path"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateInsight, ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight, PathProjectionInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computes ACC outputs (lead‑vehicle detection, desired speed) and performs point‑cloud clustering on the Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Handles remote management commands: enable/disable ACC, adjust desired speed, and trigger emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, ModifyDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakeAction
]

instance ReportingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates time‑series reports of vehicle state and object tracking data"
    DTDFVocab:provides TimeSeriesReportInsight
]

// Insights
instance VehicleStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Displays real‑time vehicle speed and steering angle"
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Shows 3‑D visualization of detected object tracks"
]

instance PathProjectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projects future trajectory based on ACC outputs"
]

instance TimeSeriesReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generates time‑series reports of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

// Actions
instance ACCCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sends desired speed and steering corrections to the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables or disables the Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ModifyDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjusts the desired speed value used by the ACC algorithm"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakeAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers emergency braking command on the vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// Digital Twin Entity and User Interfaces
instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin hosted on an external server; processes sensor data and generates actuation commands"
]

instance UserInterfaceComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity running the UI for monitoring and control"
]

// Environment encapsulating all components
instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserInterfaceComponent,
           HokuyoUST10LXLidar, IntelD435iDepthCamera, VehicleStateSensor, ControlTriggerEventSource
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity’s Controlling FE computes desired speed, which the Actuation FE converts into motor voltage and steering signals; these are sent over Wi‑Fi ROS2 topics to the vehicle’s control electronics; emergency braking command also transmitted similarly"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time operation with end‑to‑end network latency capped at 100 ms (R7) and clock synchronization accuracy of 100 ms (R8); sensor data streams and ACC computation occur at the underlying sensor rates (LiDAR, camera) within the 100 ms window"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration follows ISO 23247: Observable Manufacturing Element (physical twin), Data Collection FE, Data Translation FE, Controlling FE (ACC), Actuation FE, Presentation and Reporting FEs, and User Interface FE; components communicate via ROS 2 topics over Wi‑Fi with data translation ensuring type and unit alignment"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "• The DT is currently in the Operated stage, having been deployed on the 1/10 scale autonomous vehicle during real‑time operation.
• Initial Design and Development stages are represented by the requirements, architecture, and implementation phases detailed in Sections IV‑A to IV‑C of the case study."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Sensor fidelity ensured by hardware specs (LiDAR, depth camera); 100 ms clock sync and ≤100 ms latency satisfy real‑time constraints; ACC algorithm conforms to ISO 15622, providing safety‑critical validation; DBSCAN‑Kalman tracking offers statistical fidelity; adherence to ISO 23247 and ISO 15622 supplies baseline V&V"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "• Physical‑to‑Virtual: Wi‑Fi network (IEEE 802.11 unspecified) carrying ROS 2 DDS messages.
• Inter‑entity: ROS 2 network over the same Wi‑Fi link; Data Translation FE ensures message alignment.
• No additional protocols (e.g., UDP, OPC UA) are specified in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "• Vehicle side: Physical Twin Entity runs on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, handling sensor acquisition, data translation, and actuation.
• Edge/Cloud: Digital Twin Entity deploys on an external compute node, hosting ACC, reporting, and data collection services.
• User side: User Entity runs on an operator workstation, providing 3D visualization and control panel interfaces.
• Each FE is packaged as an independent ROS 2 node; data storage uses an external SQL database accessed over the network."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "• ISO 23247 reference architecture guides entity and FE mapping.
• ISO 15622 dictates ACC algorithm compliance.
• ROS 2 provides standardized middleware communication.
• NVIDIA JetPack SDK aligns hardware/firmware standards.
• OPC UA mentioned as optional communication layer but not implemented."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "• Latency bound (≤100 ms) and clock sync (≤100 ms) support real‑time safety requirements.
• ACC algorithm complies with ISO 15622 safety standards.
• Remote control commands (enable/disable, braking) are transmitted over Wi‑Fi; safety measures (authentication, encryption) are not detailed but implied to be necessary given safety‑critical context.
• Actuation safety is ensured by the controlled interface to the ESC and steering servo, preventing unsafe command injection."
]
